ValidationRule.description: Only in Upsell Opps you can check the "Other Product" checkbox in "Product Tracking" section. MIS - 2365
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Other_Product__c) && Other_Product__c=true && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type,'Upsell')) && $Profile.Name != "System Administrator" && $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps Extended" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended" && $Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps"&& RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Acquired_Company"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can choose "Other Product" only in Upsell Opportunities! Please choose other Product.
